title: Smoky Dinner Bowl
description: A hearty smoky dinner bowl filled with tender meat, flavorful vegetables, and crunchy textures.

ingredients.name: Meat
ingredients.notes: Beef or pork work well for this recipe

instructions: In a large bowl, combine the meat, smoky solo seasoning, and american rest yeast. Mix well until the meat is evenly coated.
Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add the onion and garlic and cook until the onion is translucent.
Add the carrots and potatoes to the skillet and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Transfer the meat mixture to the skillet and cook until the meat is browned on all sides.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and cook for 20-25 minutes, or until the meat is cooked through.
Serve the meat and vegetables in a large bowl, garnished with your favorite toppings.
